As employee submit Report A 2. Approver A get email and approves the report 3. Observe email for Approver B ## Expected Result: The approver has all relevant notification preferences set to receive emails when a report is submitted to them for approval and email expected for the forwarded report ## Actual Result: The approver does not receive any email notification when the first approver approve and forwards the report ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos The screenshot for the issue is in Slack [thread](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C049HHMV9SM/p1775244262209939) [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** **Reproducible in staging?:** Needs Reproduction (Unable to reproduce) **Reproducible in production?:** Needs reproduction **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** **Logs:** https://stackoverflow.com/c/expensify/questions/4856 **Expensify/Expensify Issue URL:** **Issue reported by:** @JamieMcElroy **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#Expensify Bugs](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C049HHMV9SM/p1775165185925889) ## Action Performed: 1. Submit an expense/report from an employee account 2. As an admin/finance, reject the expense (e.g., >45 days old policy violation) 3. Observe: Expense is removed from the report 4. Wait or refresh the report 5. Observe: Concierge re-adds the expense or receipt to the report 6. In some cases, the report is resubmitted automatically ## Expected Result: Once an expense is rejected, it should: Remain rejected unless the employee manually edits/resubmits Concierge should: Not re-add rejected expenses Not submit reports automatically when Scheduled Submit is disabled ## Actual Result: Concierge: Re-adds rejected expenses to reports Recreates or reattaches receipts Resubmits reports automatically in some cases ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [ ] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos The screenshots for the issue are in Slack [thread](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C049HHMV9SM/p1775165185925889) [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
